title:
ACVM register - Veterinary medicines, agricultural chemicals, and vertebrate toxic agents
	 - data.govt.nz
content:
## ACVM register - Veterinary medicines, agricultural chemicals, and vertebrate toxic agents
Requesting API for list of products assessed under the Agricultural Compounds and Veterinary Medicines (ACVM) Act 1997 considered appropriate for registration. CSV and/or JSON format of "entire register" ACVM Register (as per current csv file) with the additional following content that reflects the "detailed" display mode:
- Registration No
- Trade Name
- Registrant Name
- Status
- Product Type
- NZ Agent Name
- Condition ID
- Ingredient
- Content
- Unit
- Date of registration
- Label file name
- Decision summary file name
Operational Efficiency - Eliminate manual daily uploads of CSV files containing the full ACVM register - Enable real-time data synchronization, reducing administrative overhead - Enhanced Compliance & Risk Management Provide automated monitoring of changes to our company product registrations - Enable immediate alerts for updates to registration conditions, labels, approvals, and regulatory decisions - Reduce compliance risk through proactive tracking rather than reactive discovery Improved Data Analytics - Overcome current CSV limitations where changing document version IDs break data integration workflows - Enable seamless connection to dynamic analysis tools (Excel, Power BI, etc.) - Support automated reporting of registration portfolio Data source had previously been considered, however, not updated since 2018: Metadata last updated	19 October 2018 Created	7 years ago Id	59b7f682-2d3d-4721-9e64-c36f86806dfd Package id	1a8d94dc-5503-42ad-9dc7-c39c3a7cc451 State	active

### Response from Ministry for Primary Industries
Status Awaiting moderation

#### Likely Source Agency
Ministry for Primary Industries
